docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RAFAEL-RODRIGUEZ, EDWIN COMITE COJUTEPECANOS UNIDOS BAHIA DE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ,BLANCA I.DBA BLANQUITA'S ADVENTURE TOURS GUTIERREZ,BENJAMIN I.DBA BLANQUITA'S ADVENTURE TO- ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
